label: Job
description: Defines a pawn job - the discrete work unit that the job driver system executes. Controls interruption rules, UI display, joy gain, and flying behavior.

driverClass.label: Driver class
driverClass.description: C# JobDriver type that implements the job's tick-by-tick logic.

reportString.label: Report string
reportString.description: Short text shown in the pawn info card while this job is active. Supports translation keys. Use {0} for the primary target noun.

playerInterruptible.label: Player interruptible
playerInterruptible.description: If true, the player can interrupt this job by issuing a direct order.

forceCompleteBeforeNextJob.label: Force complete before next job
forceCompleteBeforeNextJob.description: If true, this job must finish before the next queued job begins.

checkOverrideOnDamage.label: Check override on damage
checkOverrideOnDamage.description: Controls whether the job is re-evaluated when the pawn takes damage.

alwaysShowWeapon.label: Always show weapon
alwaysShowWeapon.description: If true, the pawn always displays its equipped weapon while performing this job.

neverShowWeapon.label: Never show weapon
neverShowWeapon.description: If true, the pawn never displays its equipped weapon while performing this job.

suspendable.label: Suspendable
suspendable.description: If true, this job can be suspended by the scheduler and resumed later.

casualInterruptible.label: Casual interruptible
casualInterruptible.description: If true, this job can be interrupted by casual events such as mental breaks or low needs.

allowOpportunisticPrefix.label: Allow opportunistic prefix
allowOpportunisticPrefix.description: If true, the job giver may prepend an opportunistic pickup or haul job before this one.

collideWithPawns.label: Collide with pawns
collideWithPawns.description: If true, the pawn uses collision pathfinding to avoid walking through other pawns.

isIdle.label: Is idle
isIdle.description: If true, this job is treated as idle time in efficiency and stat calculations.

taleOnCompletion.label: Tale on completion
taleOnCompletion.description: TaleDef recorded in the pawn's tale recorder when this job completes successfully.

neverFleeFromEnemies.label: Never flee from enemies
neverFleeFromEnemies.description: If true, the pawn does not flee even when it normally would while performing this job.

sleepCanInterrupt.label: Sleep can interrupt
sleepCanInterrupt.description: If true, the sleep scheduler can interrupt this job when the pawn needs rest.

makeTargetPrisoner.label: Make target prisoner
makeTargetPrisoner.description: If true, the primary target is captured as a prisoner when this job completes.

waitAfterArriving.label: Wait after arriving (ticks)
waitAfterArriving.description: Number of ticks the pawn waits at the destination before the job driver starts.

carryThingAfterJob.label: Carry thing after job
carryThingAfterJob.description: If true, any carried thing is retained in the pawn's hands when this job ends.

dropThingBeforeJob.label: Drop thing before job
dropThingBeforeJob.description: If true, any carried thing is dropped before this job begins.

isCrawlingIfDowned.label: Is crawling if downed
isCrawlingIfDowned.description: If true, downed pawns use the crawling animation while performing this job.

alwaysShowReport.label: Always show report
alwaysShowReport.description: If true, the report string is shown even when the pawn would normally not display job text.

abilityCasting.label: Ability casting
abilityCasting.description: If true, this job is classified as an ability cast, affecting interruption and animation handling.

tryStartFlying.label: Try start flying
tryStartFlying.description: If true, the pawn attempts to enter flying mode when this job starts.

ifFlyingKeepFlying.label: If flying keep flying
ifFlyingKeepFlying.description: If true, a pawn already in flying mode stays flying throughout this job.

overrideFlyChance.label: Override fly chance
overrideFlyChance.description: Overrides the default chance of triggering a flying event for this job. -1 means use the pawn's default chance.

displayAsAreaInFloatMenu.label: Display as area in float menu
displayAsAreaInFloatMenu.description: If true, the float menu entry for this job shows the target area rather than a single cell.

ignoreFenceBlocked.label: Ignore fence blocked
ignoreFenceBlocked.description: If true, the pawn ignores fence-blocked path costs when pathfinding for this job.

joyDuration.label: Joy duration (ticks)
joyDuration.description: How many ticks this job runs as a joy activity before ending naturally.

joyMaxParticipants.label: Joy max participants
joyMaxParticipants.description: Maximum number of pawns that can share this joy activity simultaneously.

joyGainRate.label: Joy gain rate
joyGainRate.description: Multiplier on the base joy gain per tick while this job is active.

joySkill.label: Joy skill
joySkill.description: SkillDef that gains XP while the pawn performs this joy activity.

joyXpPerTick.label: Joy XP per tick
joyXpPerTick.description: Amount of skill XP awarded each tick while the pawn performs this joy activity. Must be non-zero when joySkill is set.

joyKind.label: Joy kind
joyKind.description: JoyKindDef that classifies the type of joy this job provides.

faceDir.label: Face direction
faceDir.description: Cardinal direction the pawn faces while performing this job. Invalid means no forced direction.

learningDuration.label: Learning duration (ticks)
learningDuration.description: How many ticks this job counts as a learning activity for childhood development.

containerReservationLayer.label: Container reservation layer
containerReservationLayer.description: ReservationLayerDef used when reserving a container target for this job.

boardingGravship.label: Boarding gravship
boardingGravship.description: If true, this job is classified as boarding a gravship, used by gravship embark logic.

basic-job.label: Basic job
basic-job.description: A minimal job with a driver class and report string.

joy-job.label: Joy job
joy-job.description: A joy activity job with kind, duration, and optional skill XP.
